prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your family crisis management forward
items: Create a comprehensive emergency contact list with all essential family, medical, legal, and support contacts
Gather and organize all important family documents into one secure, accessible location
Research and identify available crisis support resources in your community and online
Schedule a family meeting to discuss roles, responsibilities, and communication protocols during the crisis
Create a detailed inventory of your family\
